title: Fact-checking the DNC: What Walz, Bill Clinton get right and wrong
shortDescription: Join USA TODAY's Fact Check Team as we monitor the speakers on Day 3 of the Democratic National Convention.

title: Donald Trump behind bulletproof glass at rally
shortDescription: Former president Donald Trump hit back at Democrats at a rally in North Carolina, his first outdoor rally since being shot.

title: Tim Walz: Too liberal, too conservative or just right for voters?
shortDescription: Now that voters know who is on the Democratic ticket, what do they think of Kamala Harris's running mate, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz?

title: Reports: RFK Jr. plans to end 2024 campaign, endorse Trump
shortDescription: Kennedy had been running a third party campaign against Trump and Biden, now Harris.

title: Appeal arguments set for Donald Trump's $454 million civil fraud case
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump's arguments in his civil fraud appeal have been scheduled for Sept. 26 – less than two months before Election Day.

title: Who is Shirley Chisholm? How this former congresswoman paved the way for Harris
shortDescription: Shirley Chisholm was the first Black major-party presidential candidate and the first woman to run for the Democratic presidential nomination.

title: GOP congresswoman subpoenas Columbia in antisemitism probe
shortDescription: A Republican congresswoman on Wednesday ordered the Ivy League school to release documents almost a week after its president resigned.

title: Donald Trump asks comedian Theo Von about cocaine use in podcast
shortDescription: In an interview on Theo Von's podcast released this week, Trump asked the comedian about his history with addiction.

title: U.S. Rep. Bill Pascrell Jr., longtime NJ member of Congress, dies at 87
shortDescription: US Rep. Bill Pascrell represented a district in North Jersey for three decades.

title: Some protesters won't vote without a cease-fire
shortDescription: Protesters have been marching to speak against the Biden Administration and call for a cease-fire in Gaza. Some say they won't vote otherwise.

title: Obamas fire up Dems for Harris at convention | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Plus: Native Americans go missing at alarming rates. Advocates hope a new alert code can help. | Enthusiasm among Latino voters for Kamala Harris.

title: WATCH: Obamas diss Trump, hype Harris at convention
shortDescription: Barack and Michelle Obama delivered powerful speeches riling up the convention crowd by dissing Donald Trump and praising Kamala Harris.

title: UAW's Shawn Fain 'not going to be shy' about going after Trump
shortDescription: UAW President Shawn Fain has become an important ally of Vice President Kamala Harris. He thinks he can deliver union support for her.

title: What did Michelle Obama say about Trump at the DNC?
shortDescription: Former First Lady Michelle Obama laid into former President Donald Trump in her speech at the Democratic National Convention Tuesday night.

title: Who is Stephanie Grisham? Why the ex-Trump insider was at the DNC
shortDescription: Stephanie Grisham, the ex-press secretary of former President Donald Trump, gave a speech at the Democratic convention.
